Biological definition in english: An organism capable of photosynthesis
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' ałtsaas'éí dóó ch'il shánídíín yee bidziilgo á'dólzingo hinánígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Plants live in a variety of different environments. For example, pecan trees grow where it's warm, seaweed grow in the ocean, and piñon trees grow in or near the desert.

Biological definition in english: The non-cellular portion of blood
Defintion in Diné: Dił litsooí
Use in a sentence (English): Plasma makes up about half of our blood and has important salts, proteins, and antibodies that help fight infection.

Biological definition in english: A network of lipids and proteins that forms the boundary between the inside of a cell and the environment that surrounds it.  Also called a cell membrane.
Defintion in Diné: Ak'ah bineestiin dóó protein naneesdizgo akágí nilį́įgo t'áádoole'é bikí daasti'
Use in a sentence (English): The plasma membrane is like the "skin" of organelles like mitochondria.  It separates the inside of the organelle from the surrounding environment.

Biological definition in english: The introduction of harmful materials into the environment. These harmful materials are called pollutants.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é bááhádzidii tł'óó'di nahaz'ą́ą́góó yahiigeehgo. Díí bááhádzidii pollutants wolyé.
Use in a sentence (English): Car exhaust is a type of pollution that can cause lung damage when animals breathe it in.

Biological definition in english: A group of individuals of the same species living and reproducing within a given area
Defintion in Diné: T'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągi bíla'ashdla'ii éí doodago dahináanii t'áá ahedaałt'éhígíí kééhat'į́ dóó da'ahéelchííh
Use in a sentence (English): The people in your town, the pine trees in a forest, and the trout in a lake are examples of populations.

Biological definition in english: The number of individuals of the same species living within a given area
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii kééhat'į́įgi haadahoníłtsogo hahoodzogo bii' haashį́į́ néelt'e' naaldeehígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Albuquerque has a higher population density than Window Rock.  About 3,000 people live in each square mile within Albuquerque while Window Rock has 589 people per square mile.

Biological definition in english: When the outcome of a process causes further change and the process increases or decreases
Defintion in Diné: Ha'átíi da álnéehgo bil hoolzhishgo álnééhígíí náás áániił éí doodago ni'áániił silį́į́'
Use in a sentence (English): Climate change is accelerating because of a positive feedback loop.  Increased carbon dioxide concentrations cause global temperatures to rise. As oceans warm, they can't absorb as much carbon dioxide, which further warms the climate.

Biological definition in english: The killing and eating of one organism (the prey) by another (the predator)
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii dahináanii nááná ła' neitseed dóó yiyą́ągo.
Use in a sentence (English): Predation occurs when a lizard eats a fly, a cat eats a mouse, or a bear eats a fish.

Biological definition in english: An organism that lives mostly by killing and eating other animals
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii hináanii náánáła' neiłtseed dóó yiyą́ąyee hiná
Use in a sentence (English): Mountain lions are predators because they must hunt other animals to survive.

Biological definition in english: The period of time in which an unborn offspring is carried within the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ootsą́; I'niitsąąd dóó awéé' hazlį́į'jį'
Use in a sentence (English): In African elephants, pregnancy can last up to 22 months while pregnancy in cats is about 9 weeks.

Biological definition in english: An organism that is hunted or caught for food, usually by a predator.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii nááná łahdę́ę́' hináanii nida'ałtseedii chodabooł'ínígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Deer are prey for many animals including mountain lions and people.

Biological definition in english: The chance that something will happen or of a hypothesis being correct
Defintion in Diné: Haa da hoot'éedoo le' hasingo éí doodago na'alkaahgo naalkaahii ádoonííł nawólnínígíí
Use in a sentence (English): When you role a six-sided die, the probability of rolling a three is 1/6, or 16.7%.

Biological definition in english: Organisms that are capable of photosynthesis and are the basis of a food chain.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii shánídíín choyooł'į́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziil dahólǫ́ éí ts'ídá binahjį' ch'iyáán nihwiileeh
Use in a sentence (English): A common food chain in a field includes grass, which are producers that can be eaten by grasshoppers, which then can be eaten by other animals.

Biological definition in english: A unicellular organism that does not have a nucleus and has few organelles.  Compare with eukaryote.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hinááts'óóz t'ááła'í si'ą́ągo bits'íís nilį́įgo biyi'di bijéí, nucleus doo hólǫ́ǫ da
Use in a sentence (English): The bacteria in your gut are prokaryotes that help you digest food and defend against pathogens.

Biological definition in english: The first stage of mitosis or meiosis where chromosomes are compressed
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ał'ąą át'éego ałts'á níséego, mitosis éí doodago meiosis, alą́ąjį' bee hahalzhííshígíí

Biological definition in english: A chain of amino acids that can fold into a specific shape
Defintion in Diné: Ch'iyáán ats'íís bee haleeh dóó hasht'éé yoodlííłígíí, protein, bee haleehígíí, amino acid, da'ahólzha' daaleeh dóó nidaat'ood łeh
Use in a sentence (English): Hemoglobin is the protein in a red blood cell that carries oxygen to different parts of your body.

Biological definition in english: The components of an atom that have a positive charge
Defintion in Diné: Atoms yee hadit'éhígíí biniltł'ish shábik'ehgo, clockwise or consistent with the sun's path, siláhígíí bąąh hólǫ́
Use in a sentence (English): The number of protons an atom has is its atomic number.  A nitrogen atom has 7 protons while an oxygen atom has 8 protons.

Biological definition in english: A square drawing used to show the different genotypes possible in the offspring when two individuals reproduce
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii ał'ąą ádaat'éego bee hazhdít'éhígíí naasch'ąą'go ál'įįhígíí. Dik'ą́ągo si'ą́ą łeh.
Use in a sentence (English): By drawing a punnet square, doctors can easily show new parents what blood types their children could have.

Biological definition in english: The allele that only determines the phenotype when the organism has two copies of it. Compare with dominant.
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo át'é silį́į́'ígíí, allele, akéédóó naalnishgo bik'ehgo ats'íís haidiił'įįh béé'ályaago naaki hwee hólónígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): You have two copies of each chromosome.  Sometimes there is a recessive allele on one chromosome and a dominant allele on the other.  The recessive allele is the one that will not influence the phenotype.

Biological definition in english: An inherited characteristic that appears in an offspring if it is received from a parent through a recessive allele. Compare with dominant trait.
Defintion in Diné: Hats'íís dóó ájít'éhígíí bił ho'dizhchínígíí hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' nízhdiiláhígíí éí bik'ehgo náás oochíił'ii akéédóó naalnishígíí, recessive, bik'ehgo hojizhlį́į́'.
Use in a sentence (English): A recessive trait is determined by a recessive allele. For example, if you have an allele for light eyes and an allele for dark eyes you will have dark eyes because the allele for light eyes is recessive.

Biological definition in english: The blood cells that carry oxygen
Defintion in Diné: Hadił łichí'í níłch'i'
Use in a sentence (English): Anemia occurs when someone doesn't have enough red blood cells.  It can cause people to feel tired, dizzy, or short of breath.

Biological definition in english: The situation where similar species may live in the same area, but they are unable to reproduce.
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da ha'át'íi da dahináanii t'ááłáhági bił haz'ą́ą doo nida'iiłchíigo hodeeshzhiizh
Use in a sentence (English): Two populations of squirels on opposite sides of the Grand Canyon experienced reproductive isolation for so long that they are now two different species.

Biological definition in english: The group of organs involved in reproduction
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di bee idínótsąął dóó adoochííł biniyé dahólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): The reason that female animals get pregnant is because their reporductive system has specialized organs for carrying offspring.

Biological definition in english: The creation of new knowledge or the use of existing knowledge in a new way so as to create new concepts, methods, and understandings
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaah bee éé'deetánígíí náás hideesnilgo íhoo'aah bínááhiniidééh
Use in a sentence (English): Decades of scientific research on vaccine ingredients and side effects has shown that vaccines do not cause autism.

Biological definition in english: The ability of an organism to withstand harmful effects
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naayéé' doo bidééłníi da á'dólzin
Use in a sentence (English): Animals with thick fur have a resistance to cold temperatures.

Biological definition in english: The group of organs involved in the exchange of gas between an organism and the environment to make energy (respiration).
Defintion in Diné: Atsą́ siléí internal organs ła' ats'íís biyi'di dóó ats'íís binaadę́ę́' níłch'I ałnánáálį́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziilgo ábósin
Use in a sentence (English): In vertebrates, the lungs are an important part of respiratory system as they bring oxygen into the body when we breathe in, and release carbon dioxide when we breathe out.

Biological definition in english: A way for scientists to study and learn things. In the first step, a problem is identified, then a hypothesis is made from existing information, and then the hypothesis is tested with an experiment.
Defintion in Diné: Ałkéé' honí'ą́ągo na'alkaah bee doo naaki nilį́į́góó éé'deetį́į́h dóó íhoo'aah. I'diił'áii bééhózingo ál'įįh, át'éedoo dóó nídleeł baa nitáháskéezgo saad ál'įįh, díí baa nitsáháskéézígíí naalkaah,
Use in a sentence (English): Scientists have hypothesized that plants can absorb metal contamination. Following the scientific method, they conducted an experiment to test their hypothesis and observed that metal contaminants can be found in plant tissues.

Biological definition in english: People who discover new things and research how things work. They observe, measure, and communicate results
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaah yeda'aniihgo éé'deetįįh yinidaalnish dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ hiná éí doodago naalnishgi át'áo yéé'dítį́į́h. Hada'asííd, ída'neeł'ąąh, dóó bił bééhoozinígíí yaa dahalne'.
Literal Translation: Naʼałkaahíí=thing that does the investigating "Reseacher" . naʼałkaah=research, the íí is what makes it describing.
Use in a sentence (English): Not all scientists work in a lab.  Anyone who uses observations and research to answer a question is a scientist. That can even include you!

Biological definition in english: A gene that is located on a sex chromosome
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizígíí, chromosome, bee at'ééd éí doodago ashkii jileehígíí bąąhgi hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Humans have two sex chromosomes called X and Y.  The genes that cause red-green color blindness are sex-linked genes because are passed down on the X chromosome.  Males inherit only one X chromosome, and all alleles on that chromosome act as dominant alleles.  This is why red-green color blindness is more common in men.

Biological definition in english: The combination of gametes from two individuals to form unique offspring that are genetically different from their parents
Defintion in Diné: Bee idí'nóotsąął amá dóó azhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' ahidii'ashgo bee t'áá sahdii ázhnoolningo dóó ájít'éego hojileehígíí
Use in a sentence (English): When a male and a female lizard mate, they produce offspring by sexual reproduction.

Biological definition in english: The internal hard structure that supports the body of a living thing
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di nitł'izgo ats'íís bá naaz'á éí ats'íís yee sizį́ dóó naha'ná
Use in a sentence (English): Without a skeleton, our body would have no shape and we would be unable to move in a coordinated way.  We would look like a pile of organs.

Biological definition in english: An organ that formes the outer protective layer of the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii, organ, ats'íís bik'ésti'ígíí
Literal Translation: akágí= skin (you modify the a depending what you're talking about)
Use in a sentence (English): Our skin protects our organs from the environment by blocking moisture, preventing heat loss, and protecting us from pathogens.   Repeated sun exposure is a major cause of skin cancer.

Biological definition in english: Light, heat, and other kinds of energy given off by the Sun
Defintion in Diné: Shá, jį́honaa'éí, bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' adinídíín, bits'áníłdoii, dóó bits'áshígishii
Use in a sentence (English): The function of solar panels are to capture solar energy and convert it to a usable electricity.

Biological definition in english: A species that requires specific environmental conditions or specific types of resources. Compare with generalist.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'ááła' dahyikahgo ts'ídá bá yá'áhoot'éehgo haz'ą́ągi yee hináanii bá hólǫ́ǫgo t'éí náás yikah
Use in a sentence (English): Yucca plants are specialists that are only pollinated by specific species of moths. These moths are also specialists because they can only lay their eggs in yucca flowers.

Biological definition in english: A group of organisms that can reproduce with one another and produce fertile offspring
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'ááłá'í danilį́įgo ałhá nida'iiłchíigo noosééł
Use in a sentence (English): All dogs are the same species, but a dog and a cat are different species because they cannot mate and produce offspring together.

Biological definition in english: The male sex cell, or gamete in animals.  Compare with egg.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii biką'ígíí bik'eelyéí. Dabi'áádígíí ałdó' bik'eelyéí hólǫ́, biyeezhii (egg) deiłní.
Use in a sentence (English): In many species, males pass on their DNA to their offspring through their sperm cells.
Car accidents are the leading cause of injuries to the spinal cord. If damaged, the spinal cord cannot repair itself.  This is why it is important to wear your seatbelt.

Biological definition in english: Structure that begins at the the brain and continues down the spine and carries messages between the brain and the rest of the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii atsiighąą' bits'ánít'i' dóó bíígháán bii' nít'i'go ats'iighąą' dóó ats'íístahgó áhoot'éii yił ééhósin
Use in a sentence (English): Starch is found in corn, potatoes, rice, and pasta.  When you eat these foods, the starch is broken down into sugar.

Biological definition in english: The main form of stored carbohydrates in plants.
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' ałtaas'éí łikání bii' hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Traditional buffalo hunting was once a sustainable hunting method because hunting buffalo did not negatively affect their population.

Biological definition in english: When a resource from the environment is not used faster than it is produced in nature.
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá' honí'ą́ą́góó ha'át'ííshį́į́ chodaa'ínígíí nihwiileehígíí doo bilááhgóó choo'į́į da
Use in a sentence (English): We have a symbiosis with the bacteria that live in our gut. Our stomach and intestines give these bacteria a place to live and food to eat. In turn, the bacteria help us digest our food and protect us from pathogens in our food.

Biological definition in english: Any longǫterm physical relationship between individuals of two different species, including mutualism and parasitism.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo t'ááła' nilį́į da nidi ałch'ishdę́ę́' ahee hidi'ná
Use in a sentence (English): Scientists who study taxonomy found that whales are more closely related to animals on land (including humans) than they are to fish.

Biological definition in english: The science of naming and describing organisms.
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaahk'ehgo t'áá ałtsoní bízhi' dóó íiyisíí át'éhígíí baa hane'
Use in a sentence (English): A wolf pack has a large territory of up to 1000 square miles that it defends from other wolves.  If let outside, a house cat will defend a small territory of less than 10 square miles and will kill both pests and beneficial wildlife.

Biological definition in english: The last stage of mitosis or meiosis in which chromosomes move to opposite ends of the cell and two nucleus are formed.
Any area defended by an organism or a group of similar organisms for their own use
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da haz'ą́ągo hináanii choyooł'į́įgo yaa hóchį'gi
Literal Translation: would need to specify "who's land/area". Keya is land
Use in a sentence (English): When you boil water, the water molecules will start to move around quickly as they absorb thermal energy from the burner.

Biological definition in english: An explanation for why things work or how things happen that is supported by a large amount of scientific evidence
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'íi da át'éegi dóó naalnishígi át'éego baa hane' dóó nábinázláago binahjį' áhá'nínígíí łą́ bééhózingo
Use in a sentence (English): Cell theory states that all organisms are made up of cells and that all new cells are produced by existing cells. We know that this is true because we can see cells under a microscope and can trace the origin of new cells back to the cells they came from. There is no evidence to suggest this theory is incorrect.

Biological definition in english: This type of energy (also known as heat energy) is created when molecules move around quickly and randomly within a substance, which releases heat.
Defintion in Diné: Hado bee ayoonaałgo t'áá ha'át'íi da yee hadít'éii, molecules, ahídaha'náahgo yee niidoh dóó bits'á níłdoii
Use in a sentence (English): When you boil water, the water molecules will start to move around quickly as they absorb thermal energy from the burner.

Biological definition in english: A group of cells that perform a similar function
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí t'áá ahedaałt'éego dóó binaanish t'ááłá'ígo
Use in a sentence (English): Gum disease causes your gum tissue to become red, swollen, and bleed easily.  You can prevent gum disease by frequently brushing and flossing your teeth.

Biological definition in english: A characteristic of an organism that can be observed.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bił bidizhchínígíí yit'į́ yileehdi
Use in a sentence (English): Hair color, eye color, and nose size are all traits you inherit from your parents.

Biological definition in english: An organism's position along a food chain
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ayą́ągo hiná dóó áadi ha'át'ííshį́į́ bich'iiyą' nánídlį́į́góne'
Use in a sentence (English): Plants are at the base of each food chain.  Animals that eat plants, like deer, are one trophic level above plants.  Animals that eat deer, like mountain lions, are one trophic level above deer.

Biological definition in english: Organisms that consist of one cell. Compare with multicellular.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii hinááhts'óóz t'ááłá'ígo bits'íís nilį́. Hináanii náádaała' éí hinááhts'óóz łą́ągo yee bits'íís dahólǫ́.
Use in a sentence (English): Bacteria are unicellular organisms because they are made of one cell.

Biological definition in english: The organs that remove waste from the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di siláhígíí ats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdígíí níláhgóó yits'ą́ąjį' kwííł'ínígíí
Use in a sentence (English): The urinary system is the filter of the bloodstream as it captures waste and releases it from the body.

Biological definition in english: An animal that has a spinal cord and a skeleton. Compare with invetebrate.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, bits'íísts'in dóó bitsiighąą' bíígháán bii' danít'i' ígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Humans, horses, and birds are vertebrates, but an octopus has no bones or spinal cord and is thus an invertebrate.

Biological definition in english: Cells, tissues, or organs in a body that have no apparent function and is similar to a functioning organ or structure in an ancestor.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís biyi'di binaanish t'ááła'ígo hólónígíí, tissues, ats'ą́ siláii ats'íís biyi'di hólǫ́ nidi doo choo'į́į dago yits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' yigáałii bits'íís hólónígíí ła' choyooł'į́ dóó binaanish hólónígíí t'áá yił aheełt'é
Use in a sentence (English): The wisdom teeth of our ancestors would replace any teeth that fell out or were removed.  Now, our wisdom teeth are vestigial traits because we have better mouth hygeine and dental care.

Biological definition in english: A small parasite that lives within the cells of other organisms, cannot reproduce without the help of the cell it lives inside of, and causes disease.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo yit'į́į dago nááná łahdę́ę́' yigáałgo ats'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di hiná silį́į́', dóó áadi hinááhts'óóz yee binahjį' noosééł yileeh áádóó bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ haleeh
Use in a sentence (English): Hantavirus is a virus that causes serious lung disease. You can catch hantavirus from the saliva, urine, or droppings of deer mice and other rodents.

Biological definition in english: The movement of water on, above, or below the surface of our planet.
Defintion in Diné: Tó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó biyi' hólǫ́  dóó hót'ááhgóó dahólǫ́ éí hoo'nááł dóó danílínígíí bił ahééhwiizhíísh
Use in a sentence (English): The water cycle describes how water moves around the earth.  Water moves around when it rains, when rivers transport it long distances, when it evaporates from the surface of leaves, or when ocean currents move it around the globe.

Biological definition in english: Cells that are part of the body's immune system that help the body fight infection and other diseases.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís yee bihodééłníi da áyósin éí ii'noot'į́į́', infection, dóó ąąh dahwiidooł'aałii yich'ą́ą́h naalnish
Use in a sentence (English): White blood cells are part of the immune system. There are many different types of white blood cells circulating in your blood and each type has a specific role in fighting infections.

Biological definition in english: The scientific study of animals
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, ał'ąą át'éego dahyikahígíí haalzííd dóó naalkaahgo bíhoo'aah
Use in a sentence (English): Ranchers use their zoology knowledge to breed sheep so their offspring have more meat or fluffier wool.

Biological definition in english: The cell that forms after gametes are joined.
Defintion in Diné: Amá dóó azhé'é bik'eelyéí bee i'niitsąądgo
Use in a sentence (English): The zygote forms once the sperm cell enters the egg cell and they become one cell.  Identical twins are a result of a zygote splitting into two cells.
